title: stachys ionica
intro: Stachys ionica, also known as Betonique or Betony, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stachys ionica include relief from headaches, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Stachys ionica can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to create salves and creams for topical application.
